title: Pivot to local git-friendly document metadata index
description: Transform asta-resource-repo from PostgreSQL-backed document storage into a lightweight, git-friendly document metadata index. Zero external dependencies, stores only metadata (tags, summary, URL) without document content.
close_reason: Successfully pivoted to local git-friendly document metadata index. All tasks complete: model updated, LocalIndexDocumentStore implemented, MCP tools updated, CLI created, config updated, MCP server simplified, legacy components removed, tests added, documentation updated.

title: GitHub-backed document store MVP
description: Implement experimental GitHub-backed document store as alternative to PostgreSQL. Uses GitHub Git Database API for storage with SQLite metadata cache. MVP focuses on core functionality with simple, educational code.

title: Implement GitHub API client wrapper
description: Create src/asta/resources/github/client.py with async wrapper around GitHub Git Database API. Implement: create_blob, get_blob, create_tree, create_commit, update_ref operations. Include basic rate limit checking from response headers and automatic retry logic. Add error handling and logging.
close_reason: Closed

title: Write unit tests for GitHub document store
description: Create tests/test_github_document_store.py with unit tests using mocked GitHub API responses. Test all operations: store, get, list, search, delete, exists. Verify cache updates, URI validation, ownership enforcement, binary vs text handling. Use AsyncMock for GitHubClient.
close_reason: Completed comprehensive unit tests for GitHub document store components (MetadataCache, GitHubClient, GitHubDocumentStore)

title: Write integration tests for GitHub document store
description: Create tests/test_github_integration.py with integration tests against real GitHub repository. Test end-to-end workflows: upload, retrieve, list, search, delete. Require GITHUB_TOKEN env var. Create test repository setup instructions. Include cleanup logic to remove test data.
close_reason: Completed integration tests for GitHub document store with mocked GitHub API calls and optional real API testing

title: Write documentation and usage examples
description: Add usage documentation for GitHub storage backend: how to configure (env vars), how to create GitHub repository, how to generate PAT token, example workflows, performance expectations, trade-offs vs PostgreSQL, troubleshooting guide. Update CLAUDE.md with GitHub storage information.
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Add content caching to SQLite cache
description: Extend src/asta/resources/github/cache.py to cache document content in addition to metadata. Add new table or column for storing text_content and binary_content. Update cache operations to store/retrieve content on store/get operations. Add cache size management and configurable max cache size. Update TTL logic to handle content separately from metadata.
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Add FTS5 full-text search index to cache
description: Add FTS5 virtual table to SQLite cache for full-text search. Schema: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE document_search USING fts5(doc_uuid UNINDEXED, name, content, tags, extra). Implement triggers or explicit updates to keep FTS5 index in sync with document_metadata_cache table. Add methods for inserting/updating/deleting FTS5 entries.
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Implement optimized search using FTS5
description: Replace MVP search implementation with FTS5-based search. Implement search(query, owner_uri, limit) to query FTS5 index with ranking, filter by user_uuid, return results with snippets using snippet() function. Fall back to downloading from GitHub if content not in cache. Measure performance improvement vs MVP search (should be 10-50x faster).
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Add background cache sync mechanism
description: Implement background sync to detect external changes to GitHub repository and update cache. Add configurable sync interval. Query GitHub tree to detect new/modified/deleted documents. Update cache incrementally. Handle conflicts and race conditions. Add logging for sync operations.
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Test optimized search performance
description: Add performance tests comparing MVP search vs FTS5 search. Test with various document counts (10, 100, 1000). Measure latency, API calls, and cache hit rates. Add benchmarking script. Update documentation with performance comparisons. Verify search quality and ranking.
close_reason: Pivoting to local git-friendly document metadata index

title: Implement SQLite metadata cache
description: Create src/asta/resources/github/cache.py with lightweight SQLite cache for metadata only (no content, no FTS5). Schema: doc_uuid, user_uuid, name, mime_type, size, tags, extra, created_at, modified_at, github_blob_sha, github_path, last_synced_at. Implement basic CRUD operations and TTL-based cache invalidation.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add GitHub storage configuration
description: Update src/asta/resources/config/__init__.py to add GitHubStorageConfig model (namespace, repo_owner, repo_name, branch, token, cache_db_path, cache_ttl_seconds). Update config/local.conf with github storage section. Add environment variable mappings for full configurability. Update StorageConfig.document_store() factory method. Add aiohttp and aiosqlite to pyproject.toml dependencies.
close_reason: Implemented GitHub storage configuration with GitHubStorageConfig model, updated config/local.conf with environment variable mappings, added aiohttp and aiosqlite dependencies, and updated StorageConfig factory method to support backend selection

title: Implement GitHubDocumentStore class skeleton
description: Create src/asta/resources/document_store/github.py with GitHubDocumentStore class implementing same interface as PostgresDocumentStore. Implement initialize/close lifecycle methods, URI validation and namespace handling, user management (implicit creation). Set up integration with GitHubClient and DocumentCache.
close_reason: Implemented GitHubDocumentStore class skeleton with initialize/close lifecycle methods, URI validation, user management helpers, and GitHub path construction. Integration with GitHubClient and MetadataCache is set up.

title: Implement store operation for GitHubDocumentStore
description: Implement store(document, owner_uri) method: validate owner_uri, generate doc UUID, create blobs for content and metadata, create tree with both files, create commit and update branch on GitHub, update local metadata cache, return document URI. Handle binary vs text documents correctly.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement get operation for GitHubDocumentStore
description: Implement get(uri, owner_uri) method: check cache for metadata and blob SHA, download content from GitHub using cached SHA if available, update cache on successful retrieval, return BinaryDocument. Handle ownership enforcement.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement list and exists operations
description: Implement list_docs(owner_uri) method: query metadata cache filtered by user_uuid, order by created_at DESC, return list of DocumentMetadata. Implement exists(uri, owner_uri) method: quick cache lookup to check ownership.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement delete operation for GitHubDocumentStore
description: Implement delete(uri, owner_uri) method: validate ownership in cache/GitHub, create commit removing both content and metadata files from GitHub, remove from metadata cache, return success status. Handle cases where document doesn't exist.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement search operation (MVP version)
description: Implement search(query, owner_uri, limit) method with MVP approach: get list of document UUIDs from cache for user, download content blob from GitHub for each document, perform simple text matching on content/metadata/name/tags, rank by relevance, return SearchHit list with metadata only. Note: This is slow but functional for MVP. Can be optimized later with content cache and FTS5.
close_reason: Implemented MVP search operation with simple text matching. Downloads documents and searches content, metadata, name, and tags with relevance scoring and ranking. Can be optimized later with content cache and FTS5.

title: Implement LocalIndexDocumentStore backend

Implement: initialize(), store(), get(), list_docs(), search(), delete(), exists(), close(). Use pyyaml for YAML parsing, atomic file writes for thread safety. Single-user model (no owner_uri).
close_reason: Implemented LocalIndexDocumentStore with YAML-based storage at .asta/index.yaml, includes all required methods with thread-safe file locking

title: Phase 1: Core Infrastructure
description: Build foundational MCP server with storage backends and basic document management
close_reason:
Phase 1: Core Infrastructure complete. All 13 child tasks completed:
- MCP server with stdio and HTTP/SSE transports
- PostgreSQL and Filesystem storage backends
- Document upload with MIME type validation and size limits
- Full-text search (trigram-based)
- REST API endpoints
- Docker deployment with health checks
- HOCON-based configuration system
- Custom exception classes
- Interactive CLI chatbot
- Integration tests for all storage backends
- Authentication and authorization

All core infrastructure is in place and merged to main.

title: Authentication and authorization
close_reason:
Authentication and authorization implemented and merged to main. Includes:
- User context management with UserContext dataclass
- User URI format validation (asta://{namespace}/user/{uuid})
- Stdio mode authentication via ASTA_USER env variable
- HTTP mode authentication via Authorization header
- Database schema with users table and owner_id foreign keys
- Document access scoped to authenticated users
- All CRUD operations (upload, get, list, search, delete) require authentication
- Comprehensive test coverage with auth_headers fixtures

Commits: 7f4fe31 (Scope file access to user), 29174b7 (schema changes)
Merged via PR #1 (bf3bc0f)
